alerts.title: Modified: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required via General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995). Codex establishes Maximum Levels (MLs) for contaminants, which are the maximum concentrations legally permitted in food or feed commodities to protect human health.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Additive Limits - Halal status of additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation sets out general requirements for Halal food, including the Halal status of ingredients and additives. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Contaminant Limits - Purity requirements for Halal food
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation sets out general requirements for Halal food, including purity requirements, which implies contaminant limits. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Halal declaration and general requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation sets out general requirements for Halal food, including labelling for Halal status. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Microbiology Limits - Hygienic practices and purity for Halal food
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation sets out general requirements for Halal food, including hygienic practices and purity, which implies microbiology and contaminant limits. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. All prepackaged food products must comply with the general labelling requirements specified in GSO 9:2022.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Halal food general requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Food products claiming to be Halal must comply with the general requirements for Halal food as specified in GSO 2055-1:2015.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Food products must comply with mandatory expiration date requirements as specified in GSO 150-1:2013.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological criteria
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific microbiological limits for foodstuffs and food ingredients must be verified by consulting the full GSO 1016:2015 standard.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Additives (excluding natural flavoring agents and generally consumed substances used as additives)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Only those specified by MHLW as unlikely to cause harm are permitted. Verification required..

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Apparatus, or containers and packaging which contains or bears toxic or harmful substances, or has a harmful effect on food/additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from sale, production, import for sale, or use in business..

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Harmful contamination or foreign substances in food
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Residues of agricultural chemicals, feed additives, and pharmaceutical products used for animals in food
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must not exceed the quantity specified by MHLW as unlikely to cause harm to human health. Verification required..

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Toxic or harmful substances in food
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Pathogen contamination in food
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Rotten, deteriorated, or immature food
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Compliance with regulatory limits for food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Only SFA-assessed and permitted additives allowed. Food additives are allowed when there is a technological justification and they do not present health risks to consumers.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Non-permitted additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition on import/sale. An application can be submitted to SFA to evaluate the use of an additive in a product intended for import or sale.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Compliance with regulatory limits for contaminants
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory. Food businesses must also comply with the Regulatory Limits for Food Additives.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants exceeding regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition on import/sale.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Veterinary drug residues (diethylstibestrol, hexoestrol, dienoestrol)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. As defined under Regulation 29(3) of the Food Regulations, 'Veterinary drugs' include antibiotic and oestrogen.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Must be declared in list of ingredients on food labels. New: Mandatory declaration in list of ingredients on food labels. Applies only to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Modified: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. New: Mandatory declaration if present as an ingredient or food additive. These are mandatory labeling allergens under Point 2 of the Regulation of Food Allergen Labeling. Applies to seasoning, snack food, and processed foods.

alerts.title: Modified: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite (as residue sulphur dioxide)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: 10 or more. New: 10 or more milligrams per kilogram of food. Mandatory declaration if the limit is met. Applies to seasoning, snack food, and processed foods.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Contaminant Limits - Pesticide Residues (Maximum Residue Limits - MRLs)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Compliance with ASEAN MRLs. The latest ASEAN MRLs list must be consulted for specific limits.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Prohibited Foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from production, import, or sale. A list of foods prohibited from production, import, or sale must be verified.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Delisted color additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Delisted from use. Delisted from use in food, as listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30).

alerts.title: Modified: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited from use in food, as listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189). Verification required.. New: Prohibited from use. Prohibited from use in food, as listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189). Some may have exceptions.

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The nine major food allergens are milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: 20. New: 20. This is an action level for total aflatoxins in general foods.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: 20. New: 20. This is an action level for total aflatoxins.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an action level for total aflatoxins.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: 20. New: 20. This is an action level for total aflatoxins.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Various chemical contaminants
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Contaminant levels (tolerances, action levels, guidance levels, etc.) for poisonous or deleterious substances must be verified against the FDA Chemical Contaminants Transparency Tool and referenced guidance documents/regulations (21 CFR parts 109 and 509).

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - 'Gluten-free' claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must meet defined standard. The FDA issued a final rule defining 'gluten-free' for food labeling. Compliance requirements also exist for fermented and hydrolyzed foods bearing the claim (effective August 12, 2020).

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen preventive controls and labeling accuracy
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Facilities must put written procedures in place to control allergen cross-contact and ensure accurate allergen labeling, as per 21 CFR part 117 (CGMP & PC rule).

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Must be declared on the label of all food and cosmetic products due to being identified as allergenic substances.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The food source of a major food allergen must appear in parentheses following the ingredient name OR immediately after or next to the ingredient list in a 'contains' statement. Specific types of tree nuts, fish, and crustacean shellfish must be declared.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Required to be identified on labels due to potential hypersensitivity reactions.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10. Must be declared on food labels when present in food and the concentration is ≥10 ppm total sulfites.

alerts.title: Removed: China Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GB 2760-2015. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Modified: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA) Online Database. The GSFA Online Database provides all provisions for food additives adopted by the Codex Alimentarius Commission, searchable by additive, functional class, and food category.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of approved food additives and their conditions of use is required against the Union list in Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of food safety criteria and process hygiene criteria is required as laid down in Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii), their toxins and metabolites (e.g., staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Additive Limits - General requirements for sports supplementary foods
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation specifies requirements for sports supplementary foods, which may include additive limits, contaminant limits, and labelling. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation specifies general labelling requirements for all prepackaged foodstuffs. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Labelling requirements for sports supplementary foods
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation specifies requirements for sports supplementary foods, which may include additive limits, contaminant limits, and labelling. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation specifies mandatory shelf life periods for various food products. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General Halal requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life periods
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Optional shelf life periods
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labeling requirements for prepackaged food
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GSO 2055-1:2015. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates for food products
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GSO 150-1:2013. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Voluntary expiration dates for food products
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GSO 150-2:2013. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits for foodstuffs and food ingredients
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required as per GSO 1016:2015. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: India Additive Limits - Specific food additive limits
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: India Labelling Requirement - General labelling and display requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific provisions for the production, import, registration, and circulation of Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O) as a food additive must be verified.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoksida (N2O)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Additive Limits - General Additive Limits
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Allergen List - General Allergen Declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - General Contaminant Limits
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Compliance with BPOM regulations for processed foods
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. There are 281 regulations concerning processed foods (including seasoning and snack products) that must be consulted for specific requirements.

alerts.title: Modified: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food categorization
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. This regulation defines food categories, which is essential for determining applicable specific rules for seasoning and snack products.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - General Labelling Requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - General Microbiology Limits
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Salt / Sodium Limits - General Salt / Sodium Limits
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Ingredients, production, processing, use, cooking, or preservation methods for food or additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against MHLW established criteria/standards. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Unapproved additives (excluding natural flavoring agents and generally consumed items used as additives)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited, unless MHLW specifies as unlikely to cause harm. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Methods of producing, processing, using, cooking, or preserving food or additives; ingredients of food or additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Must conform to criteria/standards established by MHLW. Verification required..

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Standards for apparatus, containers, packaging, raw materials thereof, and production methods
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Must conform to criteria/standards established by MHLW. Verification required..

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Foreign substances
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited if likely to cause harm due to contamination or addition of foreign substances. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Residues of agricultural chemicals, feed additives, and pharmaceutical products for animals
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Exceeding MHLW-specified quantities is prohibited. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.
